title: Exeedme - Senior Software Engineer
description: As a Senior Software Developer, I lead the design and development of scalable Web3 solutions, with a strong focus on NFT marketplace architecture and blockchain technology integration. I ensure architectural consistency and code quality across multiple projects, defining technical standards, optimizing deployment pipelines, and guiding key technology decisions. My role bridges business requirements and technical execution, promoting best practices, innovation, and a culture of continuous improvement within the engineering team.

title: Ceiia - Software Engineer
description: I was responsible for frontend development and for aligning the client's requirements with the lead to prioritize tasks. I also handled UI/UX design. As a software engineer, I made decisions regarding technology selection, deployment processes, development environments, and standards definition. The technological solution supported a platform responsible for tracking, configuration, firmware updates, and sending commands to vehicle devices, while also displaying telemetric data.

title: Universidade do Minho - Researcher
description: I developed a solution to address a real problem in the healthcare sector focused on managing work teams, their professionals, and respective skills. My work involved design, implementation, and planning across multiple project phases. Initial tasks included data model and ETL process design, followed by frontend and backend development with scalability, performance, and user experience as core priorities.

title: Farfetch - Frontend Engineer
description: At farfetch.com, where I worked on the product page, I created components for the Design System. I am currently work with Graphql under a new contract. My journey have been important for incresse knowledge as developer and personalaty.

title: GISCON
description: I was the responsible person for the development of a Web platform focused on management and access control, planning and software development. I was also the responsible person for the development of tools which allow interoperability and data update between heterogeneous systems.

title: Assistant Professor (Invited) - ESMAD
description: I was Teacher in ESMAD in 2 curricular units: Web Developer and Project, to the 2nd year of degree in Tecnologies and Information Sistems to the Web.

title: Program Qualifica-IT Universidade do Minho
description: I’ve also played the role as a trainer in the program Qualifica-IT on the curricular unit of Web Development.

title: Symbiotic technology for societal eﬀiciency gains
description: In this project I was the responsible person for the development of the Web platform, focused and aimed to the management of users profiles in an hospital environment.

title: INTELLITAG – Smart Tags
description: In this project I developed a reading and writting software of RFID Tags in which the purpose of it was to re-write RFID Tags that had not being coded yet. During that project I developed as well tasks focusing in the development and interoperability of a Web platform aimed to the Business Intelligence.

title: Intelligent Support System for Intensive Care Medicine
description: Developed a system of data collection in Python, built with many clients and a single server which communicates with an Oracle database, been the datacollected supported for the models of Data Mining developed in R.
